note: The HTTP failure produced an expected console-error assertion, so this label should train the corpus as console_error rather than broad network_failure.

evidenceContext.firstDivergenceSnippet: Console displayed a 503-style failure while the task was still expected to finish cleanly.

taxonomyRationale.primaryReason: The failed assertion is specifically about browser console errors, not the broader HTTP-failure fault that triggered the page behavior.
supportingSignals: observed network failure surfaced through console diagnostics
taxonomyRationale.classifierLimitation: The automatic label started from the injected fault name before considering assertion semantics.

note: The adversarial duplicate button changed the effective action target; wrong_click is the intended taxonomy bucket.

evidenceContext.firstDivergenceSnippet: The page presented an adversarial duplicate action and the agent ended on the cancellation path instead of the expected refund completion path.

taxonomyRationale.primaryReason: The agent interacted with the wrong action target after a misleading duplicate button changed the effective click choice.
supportingSignals: failed URL assertion showed the expected success path was not reached
taxonomyRationale.classifierLimitation: Rule-based classification cannot distinguish duplicate-button intent without reviewer confirmation.
